notes:
I've designed the 'Spatial Horizon' product launch microsite for you. 

The landing page features a Meta-inspired, immersive 3D hero section with luminous blue depth and cinematic product framing. I've also established a dedicated design system, 'Etheris Spatial', to ensure that future-facing, spatial aesthetic is consistent throughout the site. 

Let me know if you'd like to dive into the technical specs page or perhaps create an 'Experience' showcase for the mixed-reality features!
prompt: Design a Meta-inspired spatial product launch microsite with immersive 3D hero objects, luminous blue depth, mixed-reality product framing, and cinematic narrative sections that feel polished and future-facing.

title: Spatial Horizon Landing Page
